name: Banner
description: Displays an in-context notification related to the user’s current task or workflow.

variant.description: Emphasizes styling by applying a background color

children.description: Banner content, typically composed with BannerContent and optional BannerActions

slots.children: Use BannerContent for message content and BannerActions for interactive actions

keyboard: Tab moves focus through interactive elements
aria: When dynamically inserting role="status" content, test screen reader announcements and consider preloading a status container if announcements are not reliable
